name: ironclaw-webui-v2-frontend
description: Build tooling for the WebUI v2 SPA. Bundles the local ES modules and the React ecosystem into static/dist via esbuild. NOT a runtime npm package — cargo never invokes this. Run ./build.sh by hand after editing static/js/** or to refresh vendored deps; the outputs under static/dist and static/vendor are committed so cargo build needs no network or node.
